title: cert-issuer Step params
description: Input Contract for the cert-issuer reconcile Actuator (ADR-0050). Desired state: a valid cert for commonName under role, refreshed before renewBefore. csr is the TARGET's certificate-signing request — the private key is born on the target and never crosses the wire (§2.5, CSR/sign). Hand-written — derivation ladder rung 1 (§2.2).

commonName.description: The leaf certificate commonName — the reconcile unit (stable across renewals; the serial-Entity churns).

role.description: The PKI role to sign under (OpenBao /sign/:role).

ttl.description: Issued cert lease, e.g. 720h. Empty defaults to the role's TTL.

renewBefore.description: Renew when notAfter is within this window, e.g. 168h. Empty means renew only when absent.

csr.description: The target-generated CSR PEM (born-on-target). Required when issue/renew is needed; Apply refuses to sign without it rather than /issue-and-discard a key.
